output: Completed the batch 5 verification pass for the shot-creation migration. The required targeted suites all pass, the atomic-shot-creation repro script passed, and grep confirms there are no `isOptimistic`, `applyAtomicShotCacheUpdate`, or `useCreateShotWithImage` remnants in the shot-creation surface. The repository-wide `vitest` suite does not pass, but the observed failures are outside the shot-creation migration and are spread across unrelated segments, tasks, context, and character-animate tests.
deviations: The full repository `vitest` suite is failing in unrelated parts of the dirty worktree, so T11 could not be closed as fully passing. Representative failing files observed during the full-suite runs include `src/shared/hooks/segments/__tests__/segmentOutputsQueries.test.ts`, `src/shared/hooks/tasks/__tests__/useTaskCancellation.test.ts`, `src/tools/character-animate/lib/__tests__/characterAnimate.test.ts`, `src/shared/contexts/__tests__/PanesContext.test.tsx`, and `src/shared/hooks/__tests__/usePersistentToolState.test.ts`.

The compact/JSON full-suite reruns clearly reproduced repo-wide failures but did not emit a final completed summary file within the available runtime window; the targeted migration suites and grep checks did complete successfully.

task_updates.executor_notes: Targeted verification passed for the migrated surface: `npx vitest run src/shared/hooks/shotCreation/` passed (3 files / 10 tests), `npx vitest run src/shared/hooks/shots/` passed (11 files / 115 tests), `npx vitest run src/shared/hooks/__tests__/useShotCreation.test.ts` passed (1 file / 6 tests), and `npx vitest run src/shared/hooks/invalidation/` passed (5 files / 38 tests). The temporary repro script `tmp_verify_atomic_shot_creation.mjs` also passed before cleanup, confirming the atomic shot-creation paths no longer contain optimistic cache markers, delayed invalidation glue, or the retired `create_shot_with_image` surface. Grep checks are clean for `isOptimistic` in the shot-creation surface and for `applyAtomicShotCacheUpdate` / `useCreateShotWithImage` across `src/`. The full repository `npx vitest run` does not pass, but the failures observed are outside the shot-creation migration and appear pre-existing/adjacent to unrelated worktree changes.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Partially.
